title: Savory Gooey Syrian Wild Garlic Leaves Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly Syrian dish featuring wild garlic leaves that are savory and gooey when baked, perfect for a quick lunch or snack.
instructions: Gently wash and dry the wild garlic leaves.
In a large bowl, mix the chopped onions and minced garlic with paprika powder and a pinch of salt. Toss well until combined evenly.
Fold in the wild garlic leaves into the onion-garlic-paprika mixture.
Drizzle olive oil over the mixture to prevent sticking.
Transfer the mixture onto a baking dish lined with parchment paper, ensuring even distribution.
Bake for 15 minutes or until golden and gooey on top.
Serve hot as a snack or accompaniment with bread.
